text:
[residual] none reachable: no principals or credentials handled
[residual] none; enforcement-bypass covered under kept 'authorization'
[residual] mis-recorded command is a data-integrity concern (kept), not an audit failure
[residual] tree crafted to fool clean-check is enforcement-bypass (covered under authorization), not rate/replay abuse
[residual] stale hook runs harmless surfaces:gen prestep until postinstall re-runs
[residual] would matter only if a future clean-check shell-interpolated a filename
[residual] none: no secret material flows through these paths
[residual] none: no PII present
[residual] none: no regulated data domain reached
[residual] clock skew corrupts only the audit timestamp, never a skip/eviction decision
[residual] a hanging git status is a pre-existing bounded sync call already made by computeTreeState
[residual] only if the removed diagnostic line had carried an operative cue an agent depended on (it did not)
[close_reason] git pre-push hook + test harness + pure clean-check touch no login/credential path
[close_reason] no inbound access-control model, no principals/roles in a dev git hook / cache clean-check
[close_reason] only audit-ish artifact is write-only green-cache 'command' field with no non-repudiation consumer
[close_reason] local dev git hook has no external/at-scale attacker surface
[close_reason] green-cache format unchanged, content-addressed by tree hash; no schema/API bump, no external consumer
[close_reason] git invoked with fixed arg arrays; porcelain paths parsed as data, never interpolated into shell/command
[close_reason] clean-check/green-cache store only tree hash + command string + timestamp
[close_reason] internal dev tooling, no user/personal data collected or logged
[close_reason] no personal data / retention / deletion obligation in a git hook + test harness + cache
[close_reason] recorded_at is audit-only; shouldSkipGate + FIFO eviction are insertion-order, not time-dependent
[close_reason] push-gate referenced only in comments in autopilot-loop/complete; sync leaf clean-check adds no new spawn, no loop/terminal logic modified
[close_reason] removes an obsolete diagnostic stderr line; no charter/operative-banner rewrite; blocking bypass directive untouched
